description: Core course covering fundamentals of treat acquisition: paw shakes, sit-stay combos, and the puppy-eyes technique.
Graduate seminar on lap positioning, blanket-sharing strategies, and multi-pet cuddle coordination.
Lab course co-taught with Lucas (Ragdoll cat). Students learn dog-cat interaction protocols, play initiation signals, and conflict resolution.

course: Warmth-Seeking Behavior: From Theory to Practice
description: Guest lecture on the physics of sunbeam tracking and optimal couch-spot selection.
